creator: jguojun@sbcglobal.net
text:
pdflib-7.0.5_2 is missing for package gnuplot-4.6.2_1.tbz

CoinMP-1.6.0_1 and croscorefonts-1.21.0 are missing for apache-openoffice-*-.tbz

Due to those missing packages, gnuplot-4.6.2_1 and apache-openoffice-3.4 or apache-openoffice-4.0 cannot be installed on 8.4-release.

Fix: 

Need to included those missing packages in ports/i386/package-8.4-release
How-To-Repeat: try to install gnuplot-4.6.2_1 and apache-openoffice-* from package-8.4-release.
